debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
μ ν : ComplexMeasure α
f : α → ℂ
⊢ ∫ (x : α),
      @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ (μ + ν) x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ (μ + ν) =
    ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ μ x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ μ +
      ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ ν x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ ν

failed_attempts:
simpa using (by
    classical
    have : (μ + ν : ComplexMeasure α) = μ + ν := rfl
    simp [this])

ext s hs
  simpa using (map_add (μ := μ) (ν := ν) s)

simpa [integral] using (by
    simpa using (ComplexMeasure.integral_add (μ := μ) (ν := ν) f))

simpa using (by
    ext s hs
    simp [ComplexMeasure.add_apply, add_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] : True)
simpa using (map_add μ ν (fun a => f a))

classical
  -- This integral is defined via the Bochner integral against the vector measure.
  simpa [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral, var, ang] using
    (μ.integral_add ν f)

simpa using (by
    classical
    simpa [MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.integral] using
      (ComplexMeasure.integral_add (μ := μ) (ν := ν) f))
